Home / Services / Wiring Services

Wiring Services

Comprehensive wiring services for new construction, remodels, and repairs in Boise.

Proper wiring is essential for the safe and reliable operation of your electrical system. Tier 1 Electric provides comprehensive wiring services for new construction, remodels, and repairs. Our experienced electricians can handle any wiring project, from running new circuits to replacing damaged wiring.

We use high-quality wiring materials and follow all electrical codes to ensure the safety and longevity of your electrical system. We can also help you identify and address potential wiring hazards, such as aluminum wiring or knob-and-tube wiring. We understand the intricacies of wiring in older homes in the Boise area and the importance of updating wiring to meet modern electrical demands.

Whether you're building a new home, remodeling your kitchen, or simply need to replace a damaged wire, Tier 1 Electric has the expertise and resources to get the job done right. We provide detailed proposals, clear communication, and exceptional workmanship to ensure your complete satisfaction.

Our Process

  1. 01 Step 1: Contact Tier 1 Electric to discuss your wiring needs.
  2. 02 Step 2: We'll provide a detailed proposal and timeline for the project.
  3. 03 Step 3: Our electricians will perform the wiring according to code and best practices.
  4. 04 Step 4: We'll conduct a thorough inspection to ensure everything is working properly.

Benefits

  • Safe and reliable wiring
  • Compliance with all electrical codes
  • High-quality materials and workmanship
  • Detailed proposals and clear communication

Frequently Asked Questions

What are the signs of faulty wiring?

Signs of faulty wiring include flickering lights, sparking outlets, and a burning smell.

Can you replace aluminum wiring?

Yes, we can replace aluminum wiring with safer copper wiring.

Do you offer wiring services for commercial properties?

Yes, we provide wiring services for both residential and commercial properties.

Get a Free Estimate

Ready to get started with wiring services? Contact us today.

Request Quote Or call: +12085505887
